name: Query Rewriter (Gemini 3.5 Flash — Structured) - TCH Concierge Pre-Processor

meta.description: Pre-processes raw customer messages for the AI Concierge. Translates Arabic/Franco-Arabic, strips noise, extracts structured JSON (rewritten_query, is_greeting, detected_language, intent). Uses Google AI Studio gemini-3.5-flash — FREE tier, no Vertex/Bearer token needed. POST /webhook/concierge-rewrite { message: '...', channel: 'whatsapp'|'web' }
